_comment: MCP server definitions for the action executor. Each key maps to a ToolType.
_comment_gmail_calendar: Gmail/Calendar: @googleapis/mcp-server-* do not exist on npm. Use e.g. @shinzolabs/gmail-mcp, @iflow-mcp/google-calendar-mcp (tool names may differ).

slack._comment_env: For POST /runs/:id/actions/execute these are overridden by the user's Slack token from user_tokens (server_env_overrides). Here they are fallback for CLI/other callers (${VAR} = process env).

jira._comment_env: JIRA_ACCESS_TOKEN and JIRA_CLOUD_ID are injected at runtime from user_tokens via server_env_overrides. The values below are fallbacks for CLI/dry-run use only.
